message:
fix(core): three bug fixes from deep code audit

scan_pipeline.rs:
- should_flush() now checks trigger_data_buffer in addition to
  uncompressed_buffer, preventing unbounded memory growth when
  triggers are enabled but compression is disabled
- Use saturating_add for all metric accumulators (newline_count,
  ansi_byte_count, total_bytes, total_trigger_matches, per-category
  counts) to prevent silent wraparound in release builds

cancellation.rs:
- Clamp drain_elapsed and finalize_elapsed_ms to >= 0 so
  non-monotonic timestamps cannot produce negative elapsed values
  in ShutdownSummary

caut.rs:
- Fix redact_and_truncate to reserve space for "..." ellipsis before
  truncating, matching the correct cass.rs implementation. Previously
  output could exceed max_len by 3 bytes.
- Handle edge case where max_len < ellipsis length by truncating
  without ellipsis instead of exceeding budget
- Tighten proptest assertion from <= max_len+3 to <= max_len

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
